nodes.context: Street gang based in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, involved in drug and weapon trafficking.
Rival gang involved in a shootout with Five Point Generalz in 2007.
Younger subset of Five Point Generalz targeted in 2018 police raids.

edges.evidence_quote: 11-year-old Ephraim Brown was killed by a stray bullet to the neck during a gang shootout, allegedly involving the Five Point Generalz and rival gang the Baghdad Crew
edges.context: The two gangs were involved in a shootout that killed a bystander.

edges.evidence_quote: Toronto Police conducted a series of raids across the Greater Toronto Area targeting the Five Point Generalz and mainly the younger subset G2M.
edges.context: G2M is a younger subset of the Five Point Generalz.
